sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28887" key="duse/kneustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσέκ-νευστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28887.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to swim out of</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:17:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
